name: 07 - Realistic Time-Series Analytics
description: Analyst-style time-based questions: trends, period comparisons, year-over-year, age and aging buckets, daily/weekly/monthly rollups. Every question has a clear, single-interpretation answer and a ExpectedSql. Designed by analyst persona over real Tickets schema.

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created today?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created yesterday?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) = CAST(DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()) AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created in the last 7 days?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-7,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created in the last 30 days?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-30,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created this month?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created last month?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())),MONTH(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())),1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Compare ticket counts this month vs last month.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisMonth, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())),MONTH(DATEADD(month,-1,GETDATE())),1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastMonth FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Compare ticket counts this year vs last year.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisYear, SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(CreatedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) - 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastYear FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts per month for the last 6 months.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt,'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(month,-6,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt,'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts per day for the last 14 days.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-14,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: Show ticket counts per week for the last 8 weeks.
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DATEPART(year,CreatedAt) AS Yr, DATEPART(iso_week,CreatedAt) AS Wk, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(week,-8,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY DATEPART(year,CreatedAt), DATEPART(iso_week,CreatedAt) ORDER BY Yr, Wk

Scenarios.Question: What is the average age of open tickets in days?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(day, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgAgeDays FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.IsClosedState = 0 AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: Show the 10 oldest open tickets.
Scenarios.Category: TOP N oldest by created date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.IsClosedState = 0 AND t.IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY t.CreatedAt ASC

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were created in April 2026?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= '2026-04-01' AND CreatedAt < '2026-05-01' AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: What is the average resolution time in hours?
Scenarios.Category: AVG over DATEDIFF between two date columns
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: What is the average first response time in hours?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(hour, CreatedAt, FirstRespondedAt) AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgHours FROM Tickets WHERE FirstRespondedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets were resolved today?
Scenarios.Category: Date filter on a different date column
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Tickets WHERE CAST(ResolvedAt AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: How many open tickets are aged 0-1 day, 2-7 days, 8-30 days, and over 30 days?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) <= 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Days_0_1, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 2 AND 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Days_2_7, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) BETWEEN 8 AND 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Days_8_30, SUM(CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Over_30 FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.IsClosedState = 0 AND t.IsDeleted = 0
